zh.lifeSummary: 當William Sheffield於1328年出生在英國越可爾卡爾頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Sheffield34歲，母親Agnes FitzAlan39歲。他於1367年與Isabella de Saint Lis在英國盧特藍德錫頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1409年之後在英國盧特藍德錫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Sheffield于1328年出生在英国越可爾卡爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Sheffield34岁，母亲Agnes FitzAlan39岁。他于1367年与Isabella de Saint Lis在英国盧特藍德錫頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1409年之后在英国盧特藍德錫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sheffield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Sheffield (Yorkshire), but perhaps also from Sheffield Bottom in Burghfield (Berkshire), or Sheffield Park in Fletching (Sussex). The Yorkshire place takes its name from the river Sheaf, itself from Old English scēath ‘boundary’, + Old English feld ‘open country’, while the Berkshire placename derives from Old English scēo ‘shelter’ + feld. The Sussex placename comes from Old English scēap ‘sheep’ + feld.

variants.name: Shuffield
meanings: English: variant of   Sheffield  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Sheffield was born in 1328, in Carlton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Sheffield, was 34 and his mother, Agnes FitzAlan, was 39. He married Isabella de Saint Lis in 1367, in Seaton, Rutland, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1409, in Seaton, Rutland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Sheffield est né en 1328, à Carlton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Sheffield, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzAlan, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Saint Lis en 1367, à Seaton, Rutland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1409, à Seaton, Rutland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Sheffield 1328 in Carlton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Sheffield 34 und seine Mutter Agnes FitzAlan 39. Er hat 1367 in Seaton, Rutland, England Isabella de Saint Lis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1409 in Seaton, Rutland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Sheffield è nato il nel 1328 nel Carlton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Sheffield, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Agnes FitzAlan, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Saint Lis nel 1367, nel Seaton, Rutland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1409, nel Seaton, Rutland, England.

ja.Bedale, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアベダル
ja.Seaton, Rutland, England: イギリスルトランドセアトン
ja.Carlton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアカールトン
ja.lifeSummary: William Sheffieldが1328年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカールトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Sheffieldは34歳，母Agnes FitzAlanは39歳であった。1367年にイギリスルトランドセアトンでIsabella de Saint Lisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1409年以後にイギリスルトランドセアトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Sheffield(이)가 1328년 영국 요르크실르 칼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Sheffield(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes FitzAlan(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1367년 영국 루틀랜드 시턴에서 Isabella de Saint Lis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 이후 영국 루틀랜드 시턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Sheffield nasceu em 1328, em Carlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Sheffield, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzAlan, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Saint Lis em 1367, em Seaton, Rutland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1409, em Seaton, Rutland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Sheffield родился в 1328 г. в местности карлтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Sheffield было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzAlan, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Saint Lis в 1367 г. в местности ситон, рутланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1409 г. в местности ситон, рутланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Sheffield nació en 1328, en Carlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Sheffield, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes FitzAlan, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Isabella de Saint Lis en 1367, en Seaton, Rutland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1409, en Seaton, Rutland, Inglaterra.
